mapper.sql: id, rec_id, sys_no, file_name, sub_user_id, sub_date, file_url, appx_file_type, file_size, file_type, serial_id, note
mapper.select: select sui.id as rowId, sui.rec_id as recId, sui.sys_no as sysNo, sui.file_name as fileName,csa.name as appx_file_type, sui.sub_date as subDate, sui.file_url as fileUrl,csu.name as subUserName,sui.file_type as fileType from srm_upload_info sui left join ct_srm_user csu on csu.id=sui.sub_user_id left join cf_srm_appxfile_type csa on csa.id=sui.appx_file_type where sui.rec_id=#{uploadInfoDto.recId} and sui.sys_no=#{uploadInfoDto.sysNo}
